name: Lemon Shaker Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. For 1 serving: 2 tablespoons. Tasty, very low-calorie dressing that can be used as a marinade for vegetables and meat.
2. Combine all ingredients in a pint jar; cover tightly and shake vigorously.
3. Store in the refrigerator. Shake before using.
4. Food Exchange per serving: Up to 3 tablespoons may be considered "free".
5. CAL: 5; CHO: 1g; PRO: None; SOD: 52mg; CHO: None; Low-sodium diets: Omit salt.
